summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FuturoX AI TokenPurchase component and related features. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified BuyOptions section, TokenPurchase disconnected state, and multi-language support (EN/PL/ES) all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - container sizing issue with Recharts component

token_purchase_disconnected.message_displayed: Connect your Solana wallet to buy FTRX at the current market rate

english.pro_tip: Pro Tip: Direct purchase is instant. Raydium offers market pricing with deep liquidity.

polish.pro_tip: Wskazówka: Zakup bezpośredni jest natychmiastowy. Raydium oferuje ceny rynkowe z głęboką płynnością.

spanish.pro_tip: Consejo: La compra directa es instantánea. Raydium ofrece precios de mercado con gran liquidez.

action_items: MINOR: Fix Live Price Chart container sizing warning (Recharts width/height -1 issue)
critical_code_review_comments: TokenPurchase.jsx correctly fetches prices from /api/ftrx/price and /api/crypto/price
Exchange rate calculation (SOL to FTRX) implemented correctly using live prices
All data-testid attributes present on key elements for testing
Locale files (en.json, pl.json, es.json) have complete purchase.swap.* translations
Backend APIs hit real external services (CoinGecko, DexScreener, Solana RPC) - no mocking
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed whitelist entries for testing (auto-generated UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TokenPurchase and BuyOptions features verified working. Backend APIs return real data from CoinGecko (SOL price), DexScreener (FTRX price), and Solana RPC (wallet balance). Language switching works for EN/PL/ES. The only minor issue is a Recharts chart sizing warning in console. Wallet connection cannot be tested without real browser extension (Phantom/Solflare).
rca_of_issue: No critical issues found. The chart sizing warning is a known Recharts issue when container dimensions are not properly set before render.
